name: Cytek Biosciences, Inc.
business: Cytek Biosciences sells cell analysis instruments and services using its patented Full Spectrum Profiling (FSP) technology. Its products include the Cytek Aurora, Northern Lights, Cytek Aurora Evo analyzers, the Aurora CS cell sorter, and systems under the Amnis and Guava brands. Customers include pharmaceutical companies, biopharma companies, academic research centers, contract research organizations, and clinical laboratories.

exposures.sentence: We are a leading cell analysis solutions company advancing the next generation of research and clinical tools with our novel technical approach of leveraging the full spectrum of fluorescence signatures from multiple lasers to distinguish fluorescent tags on single cells ( Full Spectrum Profiling or FSP technology).
Our Northern Lights-CLC (NL-CLC ) system has been registered or approved for clinical use in the European Union and China.

Our solutions have enabled researchers to make significant scientific advances in key areas of medical discovery (such as oncology, immunology and infectious diseases) in addition to empowering improved downstream cell analysis with complementary cell analysis technologies (such as next-generation sequencing ( NGS )).

In November 2022, we launched Cytek Cloud, a digital ecosystem that supports full spectrum flow cytometry research from panel design to data acquisition, seamlessly integrating with our SpectroFlo software.

catalysts.event: Commercial launch of Cytek Aurora Evo system
catalysts.sentence: Our Cytek Aurora, Northern Lights and Cytek Aurora Evo systems were commercially launched in June 2017, October 2018 and May 2025, respectively.

catalysts.event: Launch of Enhanced Small Particle (ESP) Detection Option for Cytek Aurora and Northern Lights
catalysts.sentence: In May 2024, we launched our Enhanced Small Particle (ESP) Detection Option for our Cytek Aurora and Northern Lights systems to identify and analyze a variety of small particles, including extracellular vesicles ( EVs ), small bacteria, viruses and viral particles and nanoparticles.

catalysts.event: Launch of ESP Detection Option for Cytek Aurora CS
catalysts.sentence: In November 2024, the ESP Detection Option was launched for the Cytek Aurora CS system, positioning this instrument as the first commercially available cell sorter with the ability to analyze and sort EVs based on fluorescent-tagged markers or autofluorescence with high resolution, efficiency and sensitivity.

catalysts.event: Launch of Cytek Muse Micro cell analyzer
catalysts.sentence: In March 2025, we launched the Cytek Muse Micro cell analyzer built on the legacy of the original Guava Muse cell analyzer.
Our Singapore manufacturing facility commenced operations in March 2025.

catalysts.event: Northern Lights-CLC system registered in EU under IVDR
catalysts.sentence: The Northern Lights-CLC system was registered in the European Union in compliance with Regulation (EU) 2017/746 on In Vitro Diagnostic Medical Devices (the IVDR ) in November 2023.
